text.title: Serverless Architecture Foundations Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Function caches user session in a module-level dict; sporadic cross-tenant data appears.
antipattern.fix: Move state to Redis / DynamoDB; ensure no mutable global state.

antipattern.symptom: One Lambda handles HTTP, SQS, S3, and EventBridge events via if/else dispatcher.
antipattern.fix: Split into per-trigger functions; share code via a layer / package.

antipattern.symptom: Incident debugging takes hours; team grepping logs across 8 functions without correlation id.
antipattern.fix: Wire X-Ray / OTel; inject correlation id middleware.

antipattern.symptom: Production Lambda + IAM + EventBridge created via console; replication impossible.
antipattern.fix: Reverse-engineer into IaC; remove console-edit IAM permissions.
